metadata.siteDescription: A private Robinson-style stone holiday house near Milna on Brac, about 30 m from the sea and surrounded by 20,000 m2 of pine and olive-tree quiet.
metadata.ogAlt: House Punta stone house among pines, with a terrace and the sea nearby.
metadata.announcement: Direct inquiries for the 2026 season. We reply quickly on WhatsApp and by email.

common.placeholderNotice: The photos in this version were migrated from the existing VRBO listing and can later be replaced with original files without changing the code.

footer.tagline: A private family house in Robinson style, set within 20,000 m2 of pine and olive-tree shade, just a few steps from the sea.
footer.listingsNote: The VRBO link is active. Add Airbnb and Booking.com links in the configuration when they are ready.

hero.title: A stone house, a private shoreline and a summer without hurry.
hero.intro: House Punta is a detached Dalmatian stone house hidden among pines and olive trees on about 20,000 m2 of private land. A wild stone beach and private jetty sit around 30 m from the house.

highlights.title: Why House Punta stays with people
highlights.intro: This stay is shaped for guests who want calm, sea air and a day led by the terrace instead of a schedule.

items.title: A private shoreline for every day
items.text: The wild stone beach and private jetty are only a few steps away, so swimming slips naturally into both the morning and the evening.

items.title: A real sense of privacy
items.text: The house is surrounded by pines, olive trees and quiet, without nearby tourist density or the feeling of being inside a complex.

items.title: Milna is close when you need it
items.text: The drive is about 15 minutes, short enough for lunch or supplies and far enough for the house to keep its secluded rhythm.

story.title: An authentic Adriatic stay, without giving up the essentials
story.lead: Here the day naturally forms around the sea, the shade and a slower pace.
story.body: House Punta offers Robinson-style atmosphere in a real family house: stone walls, a covered terrace, a garden, a barbecue and the feeling that nature begins right outside. At the same time you still have Wi-Fi, an equipped kitchen, two bathrooms and a layout that is easy to use for a longer summer stay.
story.aside: It suits a family, two couples or a calmer group of friends of up to six guests, especially if they want more privacy than a typical apartment can offer.

quickFacts.title: The stay at a glance
quickFacts.intro: The key facts from the VRBO listing are condensed here without a booking engine and without hidden complexity.

reviewSummary.title: A strong guest aggregate, without leaning on generic marketing copy.
reviewSummary.intro: The current House Punta VRBO profile shows a very steady summary of guest satisfaction, which gives this site extra credibility alongside direct owner contact.
reviewSummary.sourceLabel: Source: aggregated rating summary on VRBO
reviewSummary.rankingLabel: In the top tier, among the best 10% of properties in the area

galleryPreview.title: See the real atmosphere of the house
galleryPreview.intro: The gallery uses locally stored photos migrated from the existing VRBO listing: exterior views, terrace life, garden setting and a view from inside toward the terrace.

locationPreview.title: A quiet cove, but not cut off
locationPreview.intro: The approach follows a mix of asphalt and macadam through vineyards and olive groves. Milna is about 3 miles away, roughly a 15-minute drive.

availabilityPreview.title: A simple way to check dates
availabilityPreview.intro: Availability remains manual and easy to read. If a date range looks right, send an inquiry and we will confirm the real status directly.

trust.title: For a calm decision, without inflated promises
points: 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms and about 807 sq ft of interior space.
Dogs are welcome, and the house offers Wi-Fi, satellite TV, fans, a barbecue and a washing machine.
Direct owner inquiries backed by the existing VRBO profile and its 10/10 aggregate review score.

hero.title: Robinson-style character, with the core comforts in place.
hero.intro: This detached stone house is made for guests who want sea and nature to shape the day, without giving up the practical features needed for a comfortable stay.

overview.title: A house for people who value privacy more than crowding
paragraphs: House Punta sits on a large private plot among pines and olive trees, with a terrace that naturally becomes the center of the day. Life here happens outside more than inside, but the interior still remains functional, warm and easy to use.

The layout fits a summer rhythm: swimming, lunch in the shade, returning from the jetty, dinner on the terrace and evenings without city noise. This is not hotel luxury, but a real and carefully kept family stay by the sea.

amenities.title: The amenities that truly carry the stay

items.title: Private jetty and immediate swimming
items.text: The wild stone beach and private access to the sea are around 30 m from the house, with no need for daily logistics.

items.title: Covered terrace and barbecue
items.text: An outdoor table, shade and a barbecue shape the rhythm of the house from morning coffee to long dinners outside.

items.title: Equipped kitchen
items.text: A dishwasher, microwave, coffee maker, blender and essential cooking equipment are in place for independent meals.

items.title: Wi-Fi, satellite TV and fans
items.text: Core connectivity and summer comfort are available without disturbing the slower atmosphere of the stay.

items.title: Practical for longer stays
items.text: A washing machine plus weekly towel and linen change make the house easier to use for more than a short break.

items.title: Pet-friendly stay
items.text: According to the current VRBO listing, dogs are welcome, which matters for guests who travel with their companion.

items.title: A detached stone house
items.text: The stay is independent and private, with no shared hotel zones and no neighboring rhythm setting the tone.

items.title: Two bedrooms and two bathrooms
items.text: The layout creates enough separation for a family or two adult units that want to share a house without crowding.

items.title: Living area and kitchen zone
items.text: The interior works as a calm base between swimming, lunch and evening downtime.

items.title: Terrace, garden and greenery
items.text: The outside is an extension of the house: a shaded table, stone paving, a barbecue and only a few steps to the water.

items.title: Private sun loungers in pine shade
items.text: Just a few steps from entering the sea, private loungers under pine trees offer discretion and sunbathing without crowding.

items.title: Maintained, spacious private garden
items.text: For morning yoga, meditation, or your first coffee of the day with nothing but the sound of waves.

items.label: Best suited for
items.value: A family, two couples or a calmer group of up to 6 guests

items.label: Arrival
items.value: Access by car, with the final stretch following a mix of asphalt and macadam

items.label: Parking
items.value: A shaded parking area sits around 40 m from the house

items.label: House rhythm
items.value: Terrace, sea and privacy matter more here than urban activity or crowds

items.label: Reservations
items.value: Direct owner inquiry and manual date confirmation

items.title: Bedroom 1
details: A calmer corner of the house for rest after time in the sea.
Part of the layout that helps a group keep privacy and its own rhythm.
A fan supports comfort during warmer summer nights.

items.title: Bedroom 2
details: A second separate room for family members or additional guests.
Useful for a more flexible arrangement within a stay of up to six people.
Its position near the second bathroom makes morning routines easier.

items.title: Living area and kitchen
details: The gathering point between swims, lunches and slow evenings.
The kitchen is equipped for simple independent meals and longer stays.
Wi-Fi and satellite TV are available whenever you want to stay connected or wind down.

items.title: Bathrooms and practical upkeep
details: Two bathrooms make the house easier to share for a larger family or two couples.
A washing machine supports longer summer stays.
According to the listing details, towels and bed linen are changed weekly.

items.title: Terrace, garden and sea access
details: The covered terrace is made for breakfast in the shade, slow lunches and long evenings.
The barbecue, garden and stone surfaces strengthen the feeling of a private summer house.
The private jetty and wild stone shoreline are around 30 m away.

hero.title: A real house, a real terrace and a real setting.
hero.intro: The gallery uses photos stored locally from the existing VRBO listing so the new website immediately has a credible visual base.

gallery.introText: The emphasis is on the house in greenery, the outdoor dining terrace, the garden setting and the inside-outside relationship. The structure stays simple so original owner files can replace these images later.

categories.title: The house among pines and olive trees
categories.text: Exterior views and the feeling of seclusion on a large plot close to the sea.

categories.title: Terrace life and outdoor dining
categories.text: A stay that naturally moves into shade, garden air and long dinners outside.

categories.title: Interior as a calm base
categories.text: Simple interior spaces that support summer living without visual clutter.

gallery.note: The current photos were imported from the VRBO source and stored locally, so the website does not hotlink media from the external platform.

hero.title: A secluded position near Milna, but not disconnected.
hero.intro: House Punta sits on a quiet coastal stretch reached through vineyards and olive groves. The sea is very close, while Milna remains near enough for daily needs.

location.introTitle: A location for guests who do not negotiate on peace
location.introText: The real value of the setting is not only the distance to the water, but the balance between privacy and practicality. You arrive by car, and once you are here the day quickly reduces to swims, terrace time and a slower rhythm.

items.title: About 30 m to the sea
items.text: The wild stone shoreline and private jetty are so close that going to the water stops being a plan and becomes part of the house.

items.title: Milna in about 15 minutes
items.text: The village stays practical for lunch, supplies, the marina and short evening outings.

items.title: Arrival and parking without urban stress
items.text: The final access follows a mix of asphalt and macadam, and the shaded parking area is around 40 m from the house.

gettingHere.title: How to get here
steps: Reach Brac by ferry or catamaran depending on your route and the season.
From the arrival port, continue by car toward Milna and the quieter coastal zone outside the main village activity.
The final part of the drive follows a mix of asphalt and macadam through vineyards and olive groves to the parking area above the house.

mapCard.title: Directions
mapCard.text: The coordinates are prepared for opening in maps. Exact last-step arrival instructions can also be shared with guests after the reservation is confirmed.

hero.title: A date overview without a booking engine.
hero.intro: This version of the website intentionally uses a simple availability display. It is clear enough for first contact, and the code is ready for later iCal syncing.

availability.introText: The board is a quick guide. For final confirmation of dates, the best option is still to send an inquiry because availability can shift between platforms and direct arrangements.
availability.noteText: If a month or date range looks suitable, send an inquiry and we will confirm the current status before any next step.
availability.syncText: The architecture is intentionally set up so the manual view can later be replaced by iCal feeds from VRBO, Airbnb or Booking.com without redesigning the page.

hero.title: The fastest route to a precise answer is a direct message.
hero.intro: If you want to check dates, price, arrival with a dog or any practical stay detail, reach out by WhatsApp, email or the inquiry form.

contact.introTitle: The easiest ways to get in touch
contact.introText: For a quick date check, WhatsApp is usually fastest. For a more detailed arrangement, feel free to email or use the form with approximate dates and your group size.
contact.methodsTitle: Choose the channel that suits you best

methods.title: WhatsApp
methods.text: The quickest route for an initial availability check and essential questions about the house.

methods.title: Email
methods.text: Useful for more detailed questions, a fuller trip outline and concrete dates.

methods.title: Direct inquiry
methods.text: The form is structured so it can later connect to a service, PHP mail or a custom endpoint without changing the visitor experience.

form.title: Send an inquiry
form.intro: Share your approximate dates, number of guests and any detail that matters for the stay, for example whether you are traveling with a dog or want more context on access and parking.
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us your preferred dates, group size and anything important for your stay at House Punta.
form.dateHint: If your dates are not fixed yet, an approximate period is enough.
form.privacyHint: Submitting the form does not create a reservation. It is only the first step in checking dates and details.
form.successBody: Thank you for your interest. If you want to confirm details immediately, continue through the suggested direct contact channel.
form.notConfiguredTitle: The contact form is not connected yet
form.notConfiguredBody: A sending backend is not configured in this version of the site. Please use WhatsApp or email below and you will receive the same quick response.
form.validationMessage: Please complete the required fields and check that the email address is valid.

hero.title: Basic information about data handling.
hero.intro: This privacy policy explains which information House Punta may receive through direct contact and how it is used for communication about a stay.

privacy.introduction: The website serves primarily as an information and contact point for direct inquiries. Before the final public launch, the full legal details of the rental operator should be added.

sections.title: Data controller
paragraphs: House Punta is a private family accommodation. Before the final website goes live, the full legal name and address of the accommodation operator should be inserted here.
For privacy questions, visitors can use the published contact email address.

sections.title: What information you may send
paragraphs: When you contact us directly, you may send your name, email address, phone number, preferred stay dates, guest count and the content of your message.
The website currently does not use a full booking engine or automatic payment flow.

sections.title: Purpose of processing
paragraphs: Information is used only to answer inquiries, check availability, prepare an offer and continue communication related to a stay.
It will not be used for unrelated marketing messages without additional consent.

sections.title: Storage and sharing
paragraphs: Information is kept only as long as necessary for communication about a specific inquiry or reservation.
If an external form service or iCal integration is added later, this policy should be updated with precise provider details.

privacy.closing: Before public launch, this privacy policy should be reviewed and updated with the exact identity of the rental operator and the final processing channels.
